app/pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21 to align with the new JDK version.
app/pom.xml.why_exists: Without this change, the project compiles against Java 8, failing to utilize Java 21 features and potentially causing compatibility issues with libraries requiring Java 21.

app/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade maven-compiler-plugin to a version compatible with Java 21.
app/pom.xml.why_exists: Older versions of maven-compiler-plugin may not support compiling Java 21 source code or may fail to recognize new language features.
